snippet: Members of parents’ clubs are considered volunteers and are therefore subject to workers’ compensation and WorkCover. The department’s insurance arrangements cover any liability incurred in the conduct of, or through the activities performed by, parents’ clubs, including any fundraising activities and other volunteer duties. Accordingly, parents’ clubs do not need to obtain their own separate insurance. Financial management requirements Guidance chapter outlining requirements for fundraising or e... Dissolution of a parents' club Guidance chapter on the voluntary or automatic dissolution o... Includes information on the insurance arrangements applicable to parents' clubs Reviewed 22 August 2023
